languages.text: {n}Эоганн жмурится словно от боли, коснувшись виска, и тихонько бормочет:{/n} "Нунциус... снова? Нет, сацеллум закрыт. Я нужен здесь и сейчас, не там..." {n}Словно вынырнув обратно в реальность, он мрачно смотрит на техножреца.{/n} "Я узнаю почерк ксеноса — он осквернен. Лишь милость Бога-Машины и истовая вера держат его в сознании".

{n}Eogunn winces as if in pain, touching his temple, and mutters softly,{/n} "Nuncius... again? No, the sacellum is closed. My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн жмурится словно от боли, коснувшись виска, и тихонько бормочет:{/n} "Нунциус... снова? Нет, сацеллум закрыт. Я нужен здесь и сейчас, не там..." {n}Словно вынырнув обратно в реальность, он мрачно смотрит на техножреца.{/n} "Я узнаю почерк ксеноса — он осквернен. Лишь милость Бога-Машины и истовая вера держат его в сознании".

Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith keep him conscious."

My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn se encoge como de dolor, tocándose la sien, y murmura suavemente:{/n} «Nuncius... ¿otra vez? No, el sacelio está cerrado. Mi presencia es necesaria aquí y ahora, no allí...». {n}Como si volviera al mundo real, lanza una mirada oscura al tecnosacerdote.{/n} «Reconozco la marca de los xenos; está corrupto. Solo la piedad del Dios Máquina y su fe implacable lo mantienen consciente».
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces as if in pain, touching his temple, and mutters softly,{/n} "Nuncius... again? No, the sacellum is closed. My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn se encoge como de dolor, tocándose la sien, y murmura suavemente:{/n} «Nuncius... ¿otra vez? No, el sacelio está cerrado. Mi presencia es necesaria aquí y ahora, no allí...». {n}Como si volviera al mundo real, lanza una mirada oscura al tecnosacerdote.{/n} «Reconozco la marca de los xenos; está corrupto. Solo la piedad del Dios Máquina y su fe implacable lo mantienen consciente».

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡皱起眉头，仿佛感到了一阵疼痛。他按住自己的太阳穴，低声呢喃：{/n}“努恩修斯……又来了？不，神龛已经关闭了。我现在必须留在这里，而不是去那里……”{n}他仿佛猛地回过神来，神情阴沉地盯着那名技术神甫。{/n}“我认得这种异形印记——他已被腐化。如今还能保持清醒，全靠万机之神的慈悲与坚定不移的信仰。”
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces as if in pain, touching his temple, and mutters softly,{/n} "Nuncius... again? No, the sacellum is closed. My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡皱起眉头，仿佛感到了一阵疼痛。他按住自己的太阳穴，低声呢喃：{/n}“努恩修斯……又来了？不，神龛已经关闭了。我现在必须留在这里，而不是去那里……”{n}他仿佛猛地回过神来，神情阴沉地盯着那名技术神甫。{/n}“我认得这种异形印记——他已被腐化。如今还能保持清醒，全靠万机之神的慈悲与坚定不移的信仰。”

languages.text: {n}Eogunn zuckt zusammen, als hätte er Schmerzen. Er fasst sich an die Schläfe und murmelt leise:{/n} "Nuncius ... erneut? Nein, das Sacellum ist geschlossen. Meine Gegenwart ist hier und jetzt erforderlich, nicht dort ..:" {n}Als würde er in die Realität zurückspringen, starrt er den Techpriester grimmig an.{/n} "Ich erkenne das Zeichen der Xenos — er wurde korrumpiert. Allein die Gnade des Maschinengottes und sein glühender Glaube halten ihn bei Bewusstsein."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces as if in pain, touching his temple, and mutters softly,{/n} "Nuncius... again? No, the sacellum is closed. My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn zuckt zusammen, als hätte er Schmerzen. Er fasst sich an die Schläfe und murmelt leise:{/n} "Nuncius ... erneut? Nein, das Sacellum ist geschlossen. Meine Gegenwart ist hier und jetzt erforderlich, nicht dort ..:" {n}Als würde er in die Realität zurückspringen, starrt er den Techpriester grimmig an.{/n} "Ich erkenne das Zeichen der Xenos — er wurde korrumpiert. Allein die Gnade des Maschinengottes und sein glühender Glaube halten ihn bei Bewusstsein."

languages.text: {n}Eogunn esquisse une grimace dolente, porte une main à sa tempe et murmure doucement :{/n} « Nuncius... encore ? Non, le sacellum est fermé. Ma présence est requise ici et maintenant, pas là-bas... » {n}Comme s'il revenait brusquement à la réalité, il pose un regard sombre sur le technoprêtre.{/n} « Je reconnais la marque des xénos, il a été corrompu. Seules la miséricorde du Dieu-Machine et une foi inébranlable maintiennent sa conscience en éveil. »
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces as if in pain, touching his temple, and mutters softly,{/n} "Nuncius... again? No, the sacellum is closed. My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn esquisse une grimace dolente, porte une main à sa tempe et murmure doucement :{/n} « Nuncius... encore ? Non, le sacellum est fermé. Ma présence est requise ici et maintenant, pas là-bas... » {n}Comme s'il revenait brusquement à la réalité, il pose un regard sombre sur le technoprêtre.{/n} « Je reconnais la marque des xénos, il a été corrompu. Seules la miséricorde du Dieu-Machine et une foi inébranlable maintiennent sa conscience en éveil. »

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, sanki acı çekiyormuş gibi yüzünü buruşturarak şakağına dokunuyor ve usulca mırıldanıyor.{/n} "Nuncius... Yine mi? Hayır, şapel kapalı. Varlığıma orada değil, burada ve şimdi ihtiyaç var..." {n}Sanki gerçeğe geri dönüyormuş gibi sert bir bakışla Tekno Rahip'e odaklanıyor.{/n} "Zenoların damgasını tanıyorum. O yozlaşmış. Bilinci, yalnızca Makine Tanrı'nın merhameti ve ateşli inancı sayesinde açık."
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn winces as if in pain, touching his temple, and mutters softly,{/n} "Nuncius... again? No, the sacellum is closed. My presence is required here and now, not there..." {n}As if snapping back to reality, he fixes a grim stare upon the Tech-Priest.{/n} "I recognise the xenos' hallmark — he has been corrupted. Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."

Varlığıma orada değil, burada ve şimdi ihtiyaç var..." {n}Sanki gerçeğe geri dönüyormuş gibi sert bir bakışla Tekno Rahip'e odaklanıyor.{/n} "Zenoların damgasını tanıyorum. O yozlaşmış. Bilinci, yalnızca Makine Tanrı'nın merhameti ve ateşli inancı sayesinde açık."

languages.text: {n}エゴヌンは痛みを感じているかのように、額を触りながら、小さく呟く。{/n}「ヌンシウス…またか？いいえ、神殿は閉鎖されている。今、ここに私が必要とされているのだ、あの場所ではなく…」{n}現実に戻ったかのように、彼はテクプリストに厳しい視線を向ける。{/n}「私は異星人の特徴を認識している。彼は腐敗している。機械神のみの慈悲と熱心な信仰が彼を意識させているだけだ。」

Only the mercy of the Machine God and fervent faith are keeping him conscious."
